title: postgresql security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[12.22-5.0.1]
- Add backport of CVE-2025-8714 [Orabug: 38667546]

[12.22-5]
- Fix previous Backport

[12.22-4]
- Backport CVE-2025-8715

[12.22-3]
- Fix backport for CVE-2025-1094

[12.22-2]
- Backport fix for CVE-2025-1094

[12.22-1]
- Update to 12.22
- Fixes: CVE-2024-10976 CVE-2024-10978

[12.20-1]
- Update to 12.20
- Fix CVE-2024-7348

[12.18-1]
- Update to 12.18
- Fix CVE-2024-0985

[12.17-1]
- Update to version 12.17
  Fix: CVE-2023-5868, CVE-2023-5869, CVE-2023-5870

[12.15-3]
- Update postgresql-setup to 8.7 (https://github.com/devexp-db/postgresql-setup/pull/35)
full_text:
[12.22-5.0.1]
- Add backport of CVE-2025-8714 [Orabug: 38667546]

[12.22-5]
- Fix previous Backport

[12.22-4]
- Backport CVE-2025-8715

[12.22-3]
- Fix backport for CVE-2025-1094

[12.22-2]
- Backport fix for CVE-2025-1094

[12.22-1]
- Update to 12.22
- Fixes: CVE-2024-10976 CVE-2024-10978

[12.20-1]
- Update to 12.20
- Fix CVE-2024-7348

[12.18-1]
- Update to 12.18
- Fix CVE-2024-0985

[12.17-1]
- Update to version 12.17
  Fix: CVE-2023-5868, CVE-2023-5869, CVE-2023-5870

[12.15-3]
- Update postgresql-setup to 8.7 (https://github.com/devexp-db/postgresql-setup/pull/35)
